title: Section 180
content: Whenever, being the owner or person in charge of a motor vehicle, causes, or permits, any other person who does not satisfy the provisions of section 3 or section 4 to drive the vehicle shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months, or with fine 1[of five thousand rupees], or with both.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 62, ibid., for "which may extend to one thousand rupees" (w.e.f. 1-9-2019).
